LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT HE IS LIKELY TO PREVAIL, THE LEGISLATION DOES NOT GO INTO EFFECT UNTIL SEPTEMBER 8, 2008, AND THE LENDER, ALTHOUGH REQUIRED TO MEET, IS NOT REQUIRED TO AGREE TO THE BORROWER'S PROPOSED METHOD OF ADJUSTING THE DEBTS. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A STAY WAS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Jan-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MORTAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Appearances: Aleksandr A. Volkov, Plaintiff in Pro Per and Opposing Party, (415) 987-7000; James Goldberg, Esq., of Bryan Cave LLP (415) 675-3425, appearing for Defendant and moving party; Hearing Held and argued. Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
SUSTAINED AS TO BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Order signed in open Court.(302/PHA/PB) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Continued To Feb-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Goldberg of Bryan Cave (675.3425) for defendant and moving party
Aleksandr Volkov (987.7000) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona

Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MORTAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Order signed in open Court.(302/PJM/PB)

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

Appearances:
James Goldberg of Bryan Cave (675.3425) for defendants and responding parties
Alexander Volkov (587.7000) plaintiff and moving party appearing in propria persona

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: denied. Plaintiff has not demonstrated that he is likely to prevail, the legislation does not go into effect until September 8, 2008, and the lender, although required to meet, is not required to agree to the borrower's proposed method of adjusting the debts. Plaintiff's request for a stay was denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Continued To Sep-03-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED ON AUG. 8, 2008 IS CONTINUED TO 9/3/08 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM)
